epic_meaning.title: 10 lakh+ learners ke saath seekho!
epic_meaning.body: Workplace Conversations mein tu ek bade movement ka hissa hai.

epic_meaning.title: English se career transform karo
epic_meaning.body: Chapter 3 of 8 — ye sirf language nahi, ye life change hai!

epic_meaning.title: Raj ke saath India ki sabse badi community!
epic_meaning.body: Har din hazaaron log Interview Prep mein practice karte hain.

accomplishment.title: Workplace Conversations milestone!
accomplishment.body: Waah! Chapter 3 of 8 mein consistently seekh raha hai. Keep it up!

accomplishment.title: 3 chapters done — unstoppable!
accomplishment.body: Interview Prep mein 87% score. Bahut kam log itna jaldi reach karte.

accomplishment.title: New badge: Confident Speaker!
accomplishment.body: Workplace Conversations complete — badge earned. Ab next level.

empowerment.title: Aaj kya seekhna hai? Tu decide kar
empowerment.body: Interview Prep ya Small Talk — dono ready. Tera choice.

empowerment.title: Easy mode ya challenge mode?
empowerment.body: Workplace Conversations ko apne pace se kar. No rush.

empowerment.title: Multiple paths, tera decision
empowerment.body: Chapter 3 mein Raj ke saath aage badh ya revision kar.

ownership.title: Tera vocabulary vault: 247 words!
ownership.body: Interview Prep se 38 new words add hue. Collection growing.

ownership.title: 12-day streak saved hai
ownership.body: Ek aur din add kar — Gold Streak unlock hoga. Tune earn kiya.

ownership.title: Tera learning portfolio
ownership.body: Chapter 3 of 8 worth of skills profile mein saved hain.

social_influence.title: Tera batch aage nikal gaya!
social_influence.body: 236 learners ne Interview Prep complete kiya is week.

social_influence.title: Trending: Workplace Conversations
social_influence.body: Is week ka most popular chapter — 5.2K learners active.

social_influence.title: Raj ne interview crack kiya
social_influence.body: Community mein 4.8K celebrations. Tu bhi dekh?

scarcity.title: Interview Prep bonus — 48 hrs left!
scarcity.body: Chapter 3 ka special content sirf limited time ke liye open.

scarcity.title: Early access expire ho raha hai
scarcity.body: Workplace Conversations ka new section kal lock hoga.

scarcity.title: Flash challenge: sirf aaj!
scarcity.body: Interview Prep mein special quiz — midnight tak available.

unpredictability.title: Raj ne boss ko kuch aisa kaha...
unpredictability.body: Chapter 2 mein unexpected twist — promotion milegi?

unpredictability.title: Mystery challenge unlocked!
unpredictability.body: Interview Prep mein hidden bonus round hai. Discover kar.

unpredictability.title: Surprise reward tere liye!
unpredictability.body: Workplace Conversations complete karo — kya milega?

loss_avoidance.title: 15-day streak danger mein hai!
loss_avoidance.body: Sirf 5 min ka lesson — streak save kar le.

loss_avoidance.title: Chapter 3 ka progress fade ho raha
loss_avoidance.body: Interview Prep 67% complete tha — continue kar.

loss_avoidance.title: Don't lose what you built
loss_avoidance.body: 247 words, 3 chapters — itna effort waste mat hone de.
